# Md Harez Al Baki

> Portfolio of Md Harez Al Baki — Digital Marketing Manager with 5+ years experience in media buying, lead generation, and growth marketing across Facebook and Google Ads.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview, experience, skills, brands, and contact.
- [Blog & Case Studies](/blog): Articles and case studies on digital marketing, paid ads, and lead generation.
- [Business Growth 1:1 Session](/business-growth): Book a personalized business growth consultation session.
